title: stichorkis stricklandiana
intro: Stichorkis stricklandiana, also known as the Strickland's Stichorkis, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. It is an epiphytic plant, which grows on other plants, and has medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of the Stichorkis stricklandiana include its potential to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the Stichorkis stricklandiana typically involve drying and powdering the plant parts, which can be used in traditional medicine to create remedies such as teas and capsules.
